name: ecg-archives
description: LOCAL SERVER APP FOR MANAGING DATABASE SYSTEMS

scripts.serve: tsc && cd ./front-end/archives-frontend &&  npm run build && cd ../../ && node ./src/dist/server.js
scripts.build: cd ./front-end/archives-frontend &&  npm run build && cd ../../ && tsc && pkg . --force
